meaning: n.前辈,前任,(被取代的)原有事物
examples: He is cast in a different mould from his predecessor.
The new governor is an improvement on his predecessor.
He faced the same kind of problems as his predecessor.
The Bush Administration has been infinitely more energetic on this front than was its predecessor.
They went forward with a spinoff of Eastman Chemical that was planned by his predecessor, Kay Whitmore.
